missing_requirements: GetTerminalWindowPids() - get PIDs of Terminal.app windows
ExtractTextFromWindow(pid) - extract text content from terminal
feedback: Implementation provides foundation (permission functions) but missing core text extraction functionality. Need to add: 1) AXUIElement functions to find Terminal.app processes, 2) Window enumeration, 3) Text extraction from AX textarea elements, 4) Memory management for C strings. Request L1-Coder to complete missing functions.
